시편 7:1.content: Yahweh, my God, I take refuge in you. Save me from all those who pursue me, and deliver me,

시편 7:2.content: lest they tear apart my soul like a lion, ripping it in pieces, while there is no one to deliver.

시편 7:3.content: Yahweh, my God, if I have done this, if there is iniquity in my hands,

시편 7:4.content: if I have rewarded evil to him who was at peace with me (yes, I have delivered him who without cause was my adversary),

시편 7:5.content: let the enemy pursue my soul, and overtake it; yes, let him tread my life down to the earth, and lay my glory in the dust.

시편 7:6.content: Arise, Yahweh, in your anger. Lift up yourself against the rage of my adversaries. Awake for me. You have commanded judgment.

시편 7:7.content: Let the congregation of the peoples surround you. Rule over them on high.

시편 7:8.content: Yahweh administers judgment to the peoples. Judge me, Yahweh, according to my righteousness, and to my integrity that is in me.

시편 7:9.content: Oh let the wickedness of the wicked come to an end, but establish the righteous; their minds and hearts are searched by the righteous God.

시편 7:10.content: My shield is with God, who saves the upright in heart.

시편 7:11.content: God is a righteous judge, yes, a God who has indignation every day.

시편 7:12.content: If a man doesn’t repent, he will sharpen his sword; he has bent and strung his bow.

시편 7:13.content: He has also prepared for himself the instruments of death. He makes ready his flaming arrows.

시편 7:14.content: Behold, he travails with iniquity. Yes, he has conceived mischief, and brought out falsehood.

시편 7:15.content: He has dug a hole, and has fallen into the pit which he made.

시편 7:16.content: The trouble he causes shall return to his own head. His violence shall come down on the crown of his own head.

시편 7:17.content: I will give thanks to Yahweh according to his righteousness, and will sing praise to the name of Yahweh Most High.
